## Features

- **NIOS Role Detection** — Accurate DNS/DHCP/GM/GMC service role detection via `member_dns_properties` and `member_dhcp_properties` positional matching from onedb.xml
- **Alias Record Counting** — DNS alias records (`.com.infoblox.dns.alias_record`) now counted as DDI objects

## Bug Fixes

- **NIOS Namespace Fix** — Corrected XML type prefix from `.com.infoblox.one.member_dns/dhcp_properties` to `.com.infoblox.dns.member_dns/dhcp_properties`, which caused all non-GM/GMC members to show as "DNS/DHCP" instead of their actual service role (e.g. DNS-only)
